symptom_vector: node memory exhaustion, node memory saturation, node high memory usage, node memory stress

expert_knowledge.root_cause_desc: aiops-k8s-01 节点因 node_memory_usage_rate 指标异常导致内存压力故障
reasoning_chain: Step 1: 观察到 aiops-k8s-01 节点的 node_memory_usage_rate 指标在故障期间出现显著变化，p99变化率达到35.19%
Step 2: 分析 aiops-k8s-01 节点的 node_memory_usage_rate 从正常中位数40.88%下降到故障中位数35.28%，p99从50.51%下降到35.40%，表明内存使用率异常波动
Step 3: 确认日志分析未发现错误日志，但Metric数据显示节点级内存指标异常，符合节点内存压力特征

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Significant change in memory usage rate (p99 change rate > 30%)
critical_checks.instruction: 检查 aiops-k8s-01 节点的 node_memory_usage_rate 指标是否出现异常变化，重点关注p99百分位的变化率

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Increased disk read activity indicating potential memory swapping
critical_checks.instruction: 检查 aiops-k8s-01 节点的 node_disk_read_bytes_total 指标是否异常增加，这可能表明内存压力导致交换活动

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Increased disk read time indicating I/O contention
critical_checks.instruction: 检查 aiops-k8s-01 节点的 node_disk_read_time_seconds_total 指标是否异常增加，这可能反映内存压力相关的磁盘I/O问题
